prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (engine code: *Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi*, 2.5L turbocharged I4) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless downpipe featuring a 100-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Sport for optimized spool and flow

Full bolt-on fuel system overhaul including a Radium Engineering 260 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, and a PRL Motorsports high-flow fuel rail kit with -6AN hardlines to support 400+ WHP on E40 blend

Custom ECU calibration via OpenECU by AEM Infinity 7 standalone management, recalibrating the stock *Smartstream G2.5* ignition timing, boost targets (22 psi peak), and VVT maps for aggressive mid-range torque (target: 420 lb-ft at 3,800 RPM) with fail-safe knock detection
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-SANTA CRUZ widebody conversion kit (fender flares, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom matte titanium wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof

OEM+ aggressive stance via KW Suspensions Variant 3 coilovers (adjustable rebound/compression damping) paired with H&R 20mm front and 25mm rear spacers for flush fitment with custom 20" Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5" front, 11" rear) in gloss black with red lip

Full Rocket Bunny-style aero package including a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards (carbon fiber), a carbon fiber rear diffuser from Seibon, and a custom 3" aluminum exhaust tip setup from Nameless Performance with quad outlets and titanium burn marks
